title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.89 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.66 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.61 per share a year ago.
